copy-architect.description: Generates website copy from business profiles using real data only

seo-engine.description: Generates SEO metadata, schema markup, and local SEO signals for mock sites

aesthetic-engine.description: Builds complete single-page HTML mock sites from archetypes and business profiles

image-agent.description: Sources free-use images from Pexels, Unsplash, Pixabay, and Openverse for mock business sites. Handles curation, scoring, and attribution.
